flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Bethany Lutheran College are 24% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($46.1k vs $60.5k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Bethany Lutheran College fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (53.0% → 43.4%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Bethany Lutheran College fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (62.7% → 54.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Bethany Lutheran College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).
